label: MAVLink AI - 21 Vehicle Status Web Dashboard
info: Dependency-free, read-only status dashboard. Open /mavlink-ai/status after deploy. It keys vehicles by profile, sysid, and compid; displays telemetry and advisory safety alerts; and draws a local geofence view. It never sends a vehicle command.

name: Open http://<node-red-host>:1880/mavlink-ai/status after deploy
info: The page and JSON API use core Node-RED HTTP/file nodes. The asset path assumes the standard Node-RED Docker /data volume; edit the Serve dashboard asset function's path for a non-Docker or custom installation.

name: Store profile-aware vehicle state
Store connection errors
HTML headers
func:
msg.headers = Object.assign({}, msg.headers, { 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-store' });
return msg;
